tasks.label: cargo test build: enzo-redact
tasks.command: cargo test --package enzo-redact --no-run && ln -sf $(ls -t target/debug/deps/enzo_redact-* | grep -v '\.d$' | head -1) target/debug/test-enzo-redact

tasks.label: cargo test build: enzo-vault
tasks.command: cargo test --package enzo-vault --no-run && ln -sf $(ls -t target/debug/deps/enzo_vault-* | grep -v '\.d$' | head -1) target/debug/test-enzo-vault
